summary: Iteration 58: Testing PDF V2 Format implementation for RdP and OdA documents. All features tested and working correctly.

context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF V2 format implementation complete and verified. Both RdP and OdA endpoints use the new unified template (pdf_template_v2.py) with Steel Project Design style: two-column header (company|fornitore), Spett.le label, blue separator, centered title (RDA-xxx/ODA-xxx), DATA|RIF.COMMESSA info boxes, blue table headers, yellow CERTIFICATO RICHIESTO alert when materials require 3.1, and professional footer with greeting.
